name: mojo-jit-crash-retry-limit
description: Add retry limit and distinct failure messages to just test-group crash retry logic. Use when: (1) the blind retry loop retries all failures (not just crashes), (2) CI logs cannot distinguish 'crashed and retried' from 'normal failure', (3) follow-up to mojo-jit-crash-retry to add MAX_RETRIES limit and distinct exit messages.
